title: The Perfect Rainy Afternoon
gratitude: The sound of rain on the window
highlight: Spent the afternoon reading by the window while it rained.
promptUsed: Describe your happy place in detail.
content:
Rainy days are secretly the best days. There is something about the sound of rain that makes everything feel slower and softer.

Made tomato soup from scratch today — the kitchen smelled amazing. Then curled up by the window with my book and just... existed. No agenda, no rush.

My happy place, honestly, might just be this: a warm drink, rain outside, and nowhere to be.
